profileJoinConfidence.explanation: The smoke profile joins map 113 profile positions to strand_1. This is not FEC/LSS or ANNOCONFIDENCE positive confidence.

fec.explanation: No FEC evidence table is packaged with this 5GAG linked-view smoke.

lss.explanation: No local_structure_signal_support.tsv-derived LSS rows are packaged with this 5GAG linked-view smoke.

annoconfidence.explanation: ANNOCONFIDENCE is not bundled into this smoke asset set; the page must not present profile join confidence as positive confidence.
